mapper.select:
SELECT id , username , email , password , status FROM User U WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(U.username) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{user.username, typeHandler=backend.common.handler.LikeEscapeTypeHandler}), '%')
AND UPPER(U.email) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{user.email, typeHandler=backend.common.handler.LikeEscapeTypeHandler}), '%')
AND status = #{user.status}
